.status-bar.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(17, 15, 15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(29, 29, 29, 0.643) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(17, 15, 15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(17, 15, 15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(241, 226, 25, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-clickable.mod-collapsible.nav-fol.background: rgba(37, 39, 34, 0.62) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(17, 15, 15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(195, 174, 111, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(17, 15, 15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
